name: ASRock Z790 PG RIPTIDE Intel LGA1700 (14th,13th,12th Gen) ATX Motherboard, 4 slots DDR5, PCIE 5.0 x16, 5 Hyper M.2 slots, 2.5Gb Lan, 7.1 Nahimic Audio, Front USB3.2 Gen2X2 Type_C, 14+1+1 Power Phase
shortName: ASRock Z790 PG RIPTIDE Intel LGA1700 (14th,13th,12th Gen) ATX
description: High-end ASRock Z790 ATX motherboard for 12th-14th gen Intel processors with DDR5 and PCIe 5.0 support.
